set 0x40002024 0x4d580201
get 0x40002024 1
get 0x40002004 1
set 0x40002004 0xFF
get 0x40002004 1
set 0x40002000 0x203F
get 0x40002004 1
get 0x40002008 1

set 0x40002024 0x4d580201
set 0x40002004 0xFF
set 0x40002000 0x203F
set 0x40002000 0x83F

set 0x40021030 0x55aa

SWD发起H-reset
set 0x40002024 0x4d580201
set 0x40002004 0x0A
set 0x40002000 0x083F
cmdline发起H-reset
cmd_mem_write 0x40002024 0x1 0x4d580201
cmd_mem_write 0x40002004 0x1 0x0A
cmd_mem_write 0x40002000 0x1 0x083F

发起Gloabal-reset
set 0x40002024 0x4d580201
set 0x40002004 0x0A
set 0x40002000 0x203F
